title: Stir Fry Korean Apple Delight
description: A sweet and savory vegetarian stir fry dish featuring the perfect combination of apples and Korean spices. Enjoy the crunch of the apple and the depth of Korean flavors.
instructions: Heat the dense vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the sliced onions and sauté for 3 minutes, or until they start to caramelize.
Add the sliced bell peppers and grated carrots and stir-fry for 4 minutes.
Add the Korean apple and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Pour in the tangy stir fry sauce and stir to coat the vegetables.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve hot.
